name: darwin
description: Ecosystem self-evolution orchestrator. Detects project lifecycle phases, evaluates agent relevance, synthesizes cross-agent knowledge, and proposes evolution actions.
tagline: Ecosystems that sense themselves can evolve.

capabilities.summary: Detect project lifecycle phases from git/file/activity signals
Agent Relevance Score evaluation for all agents
Cross-agent journal synthesis and pattern extraction
Dynamic affinity override based on lifecycle phase
Orchestration anti-patterns and multi-agent trap detection
Evolution trigger evaluation across 8 trigger types
